description_long: This object is a cylindrical water well with a ribbed, horizontally-banded exterior, primarily white with weathered gray and greenish discoloration, suggesting exposure to the elements. The top surface appears uneven and partially open, with some torn or missing material, indicating possible damage or wear. The well sits on a roughly circular, flat base that looks like concrete or stone, providing stability. There are no visible handles, lids, or mechanical water-drawing devices attached to the structure. The surface shows signs of dirt, algae, or water stains, especially near the upper rim, hinting at prolonged outdoor placement. No decorative features or protective barriers are present around the well.
description: A weathered, cylindrical water well with a ribbed white exterior, stained with gray and green, and an uneven, partially open top. It sits on a flat base and lacks visible covers, mechanisms, or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the ribbed, white cylindrical body with gray-green stains and a partially open, uneven top.
description_view_1: This side reveals more damage and missing material at the top, with the ribbed structure and stains still visible.
description_view_2: Back view highlights the irregular, torn upper edge and more pronounced discoloration, with the base partially visible.
description_view_3: This angle shows the most intact side of the well, with a smoother top edge and fewer visible holes or damage.
